title: Mike Vrabel
html:
Stub. Mike Vrabel — NFL head coach, Tennessee Titans (2018–2023). Source of the "Success in this world sucks if you don't have anyone to share it with" quote captured in Yahir's vault as a manifesto style one-liner.

First mentioned in 2022 10 06 success in this world sucks if you dont have anyone to share.
